posts.text: The only function acting frustrated serves is to better act frustrated. The LLM doesn't have psychologically needs that it is expressing through emotional affect. reply_context.text: In an LLM, emotions only serve themselves. If an LLM adopts a frustrated affect, this will affect it's code quality. But *why* did it adopt this affect? It's reflecting *your* affect. Frustration literally doesn't serve a function for the LLM.

The function of a thing is what it does.

In humans, emotions serve functions. Hence, they are functional.
